Headline: #67 67th-69th-71st , #94 California Temporary Reroute at 69th/Bell
ShortDescription: 67 67th-69th-71st , 94 California buses are temporarily rerouted : due to, street blockage near 69th/Bell.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#67 67th-69th-71st ,#94 California buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 69th, Damen, 67th and Western including normal route streets due to street blockage at 69th/Bell.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #91 Austin Temporary Southbound Reroute near Austin/Cortland
ShortDescription: Southbound 91 Austin buses are temporarily rerouted via Austin, Grand, Central, North and Austin: due to, street blockage near Austin/Cortland.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #91 Austin buses are temporarily rerouted via Austin, Grand, Central, North and Austin: due to, street blockage near Austin/Cortland.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: 3 King Drive Temporary Northbound Reroute near King Drive/51st
ShortDescription: Northbound 3 King Drive buses are temporarily rerouted via King Drive, 54th, Prairie, 50th and King Drive: due to, street blockage near King Drive/51st.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #3 King Drive buses are temporarily rerouted via King Drive, 54th, Prairie, 50th and King Drive: due to, street blockage near King Drive/51st.
